title: astragalus gruinus
intro: Astragalus gruinus, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Astragalus gruinus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and increasing the body's ability to fight off infections. Astragalus gruinus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as capsules, tablets, or teas, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
